legs.label: Ground
legs.description: Reconcile the recovered brief with Studio canon and the org model.
legs.lead: William grounds the meta-play before any derivation.
beats: Reads the recovered brief and Studio production canon.
Confirms PlaymakerStudio / Production filing and the frame-the-problem exemplar.
Writes the grounding packet for Gate 1.

legs.label: Draft
legs.description: Refresh the brief and §4 graph for Gate 1 review.
legs.lead: The draft becomes the design instrument, not a workflow package.
beats: Keeps every §4 node tagged with exactly one closed-set doer tag.
Removes stale Product or frame-the-problem-next framing.

legs.label: Harden
legs.description: Attack the brief and graph shape before the human gate.
legs.lead: Fresh eyes find misplaced gates and dishonest automation.
beats: Flags any command that should be judgment, or judgment that should be command.

legs.label: Gate 1
legs.description: The Director confirms the design and graph shape.
legs.lead: The only human touch before Build.
beats: Rules the doer tags and graph shape.
